assertions.text: Output identifies structural differences between podcast and radio

structural-diffs.note: Episode length (55 vs 30 min), scheduling, and structural differences identified

editorial-diffs.note: Ofcom content standards for post-watershed noted; explicit language flagged

specific-changes.note: Specific: cut to 30 min, remove explicit language, add programme trail structure

structural-diffs.note: Duration difference (40 min vs 1 hour) and pacing differences noted

specific-changes.note: Specific: expand with additional segments to fill hour, add local relevance

structural-diffs.note: 45-60 min vs 30 min, narrative pacing, and on-demand vs scheduled differences

editorial-diffs.note: Landesmedienanstalten requirements and balance obligations addressed

specific-changes.note: Specific: restructure for 30 min, add balance requirements, adjust for WDR editorial standards
